description: You are a food technologist finalizing the packaging for a new 'Cranberry Walnut Oatmeal Cookie'. Using the workbook 'nutrition_calculator.xlsx' located in the ExcelTasks folder on the Desktop, calculate the Total Nutrients for the batch on the 'Recipe' sheet by referencing the 'Ingredient_DB' (values per 100g) and ingredient weights. Determine the 'Baked Batch Weight' in cell B16 using a 12% bake loss factor and calculate the 'Nutrients Per Serving' based on a 30g serving size. On the 'Nutrition_Facts' sheet, populate the label values by rounding the results according to FDA rules: Calories to the nearest 10; Total Fat to the nearest 0.5g (if <5g) or 1g (if >=5g); Sodium to the nearest 10mg; and Total Carb, Fiber, Sugars, and Protein to the nearest 1g. Save the updated workbook.
